first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core reasoning remains unchanged between the two evaluations. Both versions identify the same key strengths (current AI role, distributed systems experience) and the same critical concerns (lack of Python, no explicit on-call experience). The minor differences in wording and the framing of a secondary concern (technical strategy vs. stakeholder management) fall within the scope of normal run-to-run variation and are not linked to the change in the candidate's work locations from international to US-based.
